title: DeltaLake Logical error: 'Not found column c1.values in physical names map. There are only columns: c1, c0'
description:
### Describe the bug
Seems related to https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/issues/86204. It still reproduces sometimes.
### How to reproduce
Run [spark.py](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/22423595/spark.py) to create the table in Spark, then in ClickHouse:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 ENGINE = DeltaLakeLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouses/spark_catalog/test/t0', format = 'Parquet');
SELECT c1.values FROM t0; --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace


bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT) AS SELECT * FROM <your_source_table>;
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER, ref_id INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255)) AS SELECT * FROM <your_source_table>;
INSERT INTO t2 (id, ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'desc1'), (2, 2, 'desc2'), (3, 3, 'desc3');
SELECT t1.name, t2.description FROM t1 LEFT JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Selecting non-existent column from DeltaLake table
